headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics reports record quarterly revenue, up 7% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Beating analyst expectations with strong earnings growth is a clear positive signal for the company's financial performance and market perception.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
